name: White Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: No transactional rewards (Earns White Pass value on milestones only)

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year (max 2 per quarter).
international: 4 complimentary international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: ₹1,500 White Pass welcome voucher on spending ₹30,000 within 60 days of card setup

milestones.label: Earn ₹2,000 White Pass value on spending ₹2 Lakhs
Earn ₹4,000 White Pass value on spending ₹4 Lakhs
Earn ₹6,000 White Pass value on spending ₹6 Lakhs
Earn ₹7,000 White Pass value on spending ₹9 Lakhs
Earn ₹8,000 White Pass value on spending ₹12 Lakhs

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver across petrol pumps in India
Railway surcharge waiver on IRCTC and railway booking counter transactions
additionalDetails: White Pass value can be redeemed at a 1:1 ratio (1 White Pass = ₹1.0) on the Kotak Rewards portal for brand vouchers, flights, and hotel bookings.
White Pass value can also be redeemed as statement credit to pay off the card bill at a rate of 1 White Pass = ₹0.70.
White Pass balance is valid for 15 months from the date of credit, and resets annually with a 90-day grace period post-anniversary.
Effective April 1, 2026, spends on education and transportation do not count toward milestone calculations.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Premium brand e-vouchers via Kotak Rewards
Flight & hotel bookings via Kotak Rewards

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
White Pass value can be redeemed at 1 White Pass = ₹1.0 on vouchers, flights, and hotels, and ₹0.70 for statement cashback.
Spends on rent, wallet, EMI, insurance, utilities, education, government, transportation, and fuel do not earn White Pass milestones.
